shared_case_surface: bounded multi-skill requests that keep named ring selection, explicit apply-now versus defer-skip classification, execution-versus-closeout separation, and visible harvest-check pressure jointly inspectable on one orchestration surface
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the concrete cases only if it preserves the same ring-application question, keeps applicability-map evidence inspectable, and still covers named ring request, honest defer-or-skip pressure, visible plane split, and explicit harvest-check pressure without upgrading the bundle into a broad reasoning-quality or task-success surface.
public_safe_requirements: the ring request and skill-family scope remain visible to a bounded outside reviewer
applicability-map evidence remains inspectable on the same case family
harvest-check presence or absence remains reviewable without hidden private context
